name: Ostriv village
description: Ostriv village is village located on island. It stands near river,has central street "Mirna" where located 14 houses that made in Ukrainian traditional style,1 Market and 1 mayor's cottage.From it's east side comes road to street near river.Street called "Yasni Vody" with 6 farm fields,1 fisher station,1 watermill and 7 houses.From Mirna's western side comes road to street "Husta,with 8 houses,2 cow farms,3 chicken coops and 1 stable and 3 farm fields.People here mostly farmers and workers.Village products buckwheat,potato and cheese with leather and eggs.
creator: Basilko
